billing_period_note: Monthly figures unless noted. Annual subs show monthly equivalent.

services.name: Google AI Ultra (consumer subscription)
services.role_in_project: Personal Gemini app + (likely) pipeline API usage via bundled entitlement.
services.notes: Stan believes API calls via GEMINI_API_KEY are included in this subscription — agent must validate against Google invoices. Pipeline is the primary API consumer.

services.name: Gemini API (google-genai)
services.role_in_project: All board + QA LLM agents (2.5 Pro + Flash). Primary runtime AI cost driver.
services.plan: Bundled with Google AI Ultra (Stan assumption — validate)
services.notes: All LLM agents. Do NOT add separate line to TCO if bundled in Ultra — but VERIFY no separate Google AI Studio / Cloud invoice exists.

services.name: Microsoft Azure (Functions + Storage + App Insights)
services.role_in_project: Hosts app-boardroom-prod (Flex Consumption), blob containers (inputs/state/reports), deploy artifacts, Application Insights logging.
services.plan: Pay-as-you-go (free trial credits active until expiry)
services.notes: Portal snapshot 2026-05-28. Future: Azure Cost Management API for live current/forecast.

services.name: Cursor
services.role_in_project: IDE + Agent for building/maintaining this repo.
services.notes: 3x usage vs Pro; higher Agent limits. Not runtime cost but full project TCO.

services.name: Financial Modeling Prep (FMP)
services.role_in_project: EOD prices, fundamentals, news, macro (TLT/VXX), momentum — core data feed.
services.plan: Starter (confirmed in playbook; no bulk endpoints)
services.notes: Starter tier $29/mo (Stan confirmed 2026-05-28). Validate tier still sufficient as symbol count grows (~22 runs/mo × N symbols).

services.name: QuickChart.io
services.role_in_project: Renders briefing charts (pie/bar/line) via POST /chart/create short URLs.
services.notes: External dependency; if rate-limited, consider paid tier or local matplotlib (backlog).

services.name: Gmail SMTP
services.role_in_project: Executive briefing, QA dashboard, error alerts, QA digest email delivery.
services.notes: If moved to Google Workspace, add monthly cost.

services.name: GitHub
services.role_in_project: Source control + OIDC deploy to Azure Functions (Actions).
services.notes: Free tier (Stan confirmed 2026-05-28). OIDC deploy via Actions; minutes negligible for this repo.

services.name: Polygon.io
services.role_in_project: NOT USED — POLYGON_API_KEY may exist in app settings but no code references.
services.notes: Remove key from Azure app settings to avoid confusion; no spend.

services.name: Yahoo Finance (yfinance library)
services.role_in_project: Fundamentals fallback only; momentum replaced by FMP.
services.notes: Reliability risk; not a paid line item.

billing_notes.gemini_api_ultra: Stan believes Gemini API (GEMINI_API_KEY) is included in Google AI Ultra $199.99/mo — UNVALIDATED. Agent must verify via Google account invoices and flag if a separate API charge appears.

possible_hidden_costs.name: Google Workspace
possible_hidden_costs.why: Pipeline sends via Gmail SMTP (SENDER_EMAIL). If not personal @gmail.com, may be a paid Workspace seat.

possible_hidden_costs.name: Azure after free-trial credits expire
possible_hidden_costs.why: Currently ~$8/mo on credits; forecast may jump when credits run out.
possible_hidden_costs.where_to_check: Azure Portal → Cost Management → Credits + Forecast

possible_hidden_costs.name: QuickChart.io paid tier
possible_hidden_costs.why: Every briefing POSTs 4 charts/run × ~22 runs/mo. Free tier may rate-limit; paid if limits hit.

possible_hidden_costs.name: Google One / cloud storage (beyond Ultra)
possible_hidden_costs.why: Ultra includes 30 TB — verify no separate Google One charge.

possible_hidden_costs.name: Custom domain / DNS (if any)
possible_hidden_costs.why: Not in codebase; check if boardroom uses a custom domain for email or Azure.

possible_hidden_costs.name: Application Insights ingestion overages
possible_hidden_costs.why: host.json enables App Insights sampling; high log volume could add cost beyond Functions baseline.
possible_hidden_costs.where_to_check: Azure Portal → App Insights → Usage and estimated costs

possible_hidden_costs.name: Stale paid keys in Azure App Settings
possible_hidden_costs.why: POLYGON_API_KEY exists but unused (free). Audit Azure Function app settings for other keys tied to paid services.

future_automation: Azure Cost Management API: current spend + forecast + credit expiry date
Google account subscriptions + AI Studio usage: validate Ultra includes API (no double bill)
FMP dashboard: plan tier + call volume
AGENT_ACTIVITY from latest api_telemetry: per-run token volume vs Ultra entitlements
Scan Azure Function app settings for env keys mapping to paid SaaS
